name: mongodb-mcp-server
description: Official MongoDB desktop extension (MCP Server). Connect to databases, explore data, manage collections, optimize queries, generate reliable code, implement best practices, develop advanced features, and more.
long_description:
Connect Claude Desktop to MongoDB Atlas and self-managed MongoDB deployments.

Manage your Atlas resources — clusters, projects, network access, and database users — directly from Claude. Query and inspect your data using find and aggregation, explore schemas, and manage indexes. Spin up local Atlas environments via Docker with Atlas Local, and add semantic search to your workflows using Vector Search with Voyage AI embeddings.

Full documentation at [mongodb.com/docs/mcp-server](https://www.mongodb.com/docs/mcp-server/).

connection_string.title: MongoDB connection string
connection_string.description: Optional. If omitted, you can connect to an Atlas deployment or a local MongoDB instance at runtime.

voyage_api_key.title: Voyage AI API key
voyage_api_key.description: Required for Atlas Local auto-embed vector search.

disabled_tools.title: Disabled tools
disabled_tools.description: Comma-separated tool names, operation types, or categories to disable.
